name: triage_pipeline_v1
description: Smoke evalset for the triage pipeline. Starter case covers the Rule B safety short-circuit regression (EXC-2026-0004 chemical tanker): event_id-only input, hydration re-seeds raw_text from Firestore, Rule B fires pre-LLM. No Gemini call required. Expand to 15-25 cases (happy path per category + edge + adversarial + degraded tool) per .claude/rules/evalsets.md §2 in follow-up work.
